style_profile.composition: side view by default, full body visible
style_profile.aesthetic_reference: fitness manual / Darebee / Workout for Women

exercises.equipment: mini resistance band above knees
exercises.start_pose: supine on mat, knees bent 90 degrees, feet hip-width apart, hips on floor, band visible above knees
exercises.end_pose: supine, hips fully extended pushing up to form straight line from knees to shoulders, glutes contracted

exercises.equipment: mini resistance band above knees
exercises.start_pose: side-lying on mat, knees bent 90, feet stacked, band above knees, knees together
exercises.end_pose: side-lying, top knee opened upward against band resistance, pelvis stable

exercises.equipment: lever hip thrust machine with back pad and lap pad
exercises.start_pose: seated on machine, back against pad, lap pad over hips, hips dropped down, knees bent 90
exercises.end_pose: hips fully extended, body forming straight line from knees to shoulders, glutes contracted, lap pad pushed up

exercises.name_es: Peso muerto rumano con barra + straps
exercises.name_en: Romanian deadlift with barbell and lifting straps
exercises.equipment: barbell with weight plates, lifting straps visible on wrists
exercises.start_pose: standing tall, barbell at thigh level, knees slightly bent, lifting straps visible around wrists wrapped on bar
exercises.end_pose: hip hinged forward, torso parallel to floor, barbell hanging just below knees, spine neutral, lifting straps still visible

exercises.equipment: 45-degree sled leg press machine
exercises.start_pose: seated on 45-degree leg press, knees bent toward chest, feet on platform hip-width
exercises.end_pose: legs nearly extended pushing platform away (knees not locked), torso firmly against backrest

exercises.equipment: lying leg curl machine with ankle roller
exercises.start_pose: prone on bench, legs extended, ankle roller above achilles, hands gripping side handles
exercises.end_pose: knees flexed bringing heels toward glutes, hips pressed into bench, ankle roller raised

exercises.equipment: seated hip abduction machine
exercises.start_pose: seated upright on machine, legs together inside pads
exercises.end_pose: legs opened wide against pad resistance, glute medius contracted

exercises.name_es: Patada de glúteo en polea baja
exercises.name_en: Cable glute kickback with ankle strap
exercises.equipment: low pulley cable with ankle cuff attached to working leg
exercises.start_pose: standing facing pulley machine, hands on frame for stability, working leg slightly forward with ankle cuff
exercises.end_pose: working leg extended back and up, hip fully extended, glute contracted, supporting leg stable

exercises.equipment: treadmill
exercises.start_pose: walking on treadmill, upright posture, hands relaxed at sides
exercises.end_pose: sprinting on treadmill, arms swinging, lean slightly forward

exercises.equipment: long resistance band held with both hands
exercises.start_pose: standing, arms extended forward at chest height, band stretched between hands
exercises.end_pose: arms pulled wide horizontally, band stretched maximally, scapulae retracted

exercises.name_es: Jalón en polea con straps agarre neutro
exercises.name_en: Cable lat pulldown neutral grip with lifting straps
exercises.equipment: lat pulldown machine with parallel grip bar, lifting straps on wrists
exercises.start_pose: seated, arms fully extended overhead gripping parallel handles with straps wrapped, slight backward lean
exercises.end_pose: bar pulled to upper chest, elbows down and back, lats contracted, straps visible

exercises.name_es: Remo en máquina hammer paralelo con straps
exercises.name_en: Lever neutral grip seated row with lifting straps
exercises.equipment: hammer strength row machine with parallel handles, lifting straps
exercises.start_pose: seated, chest against pad, arms extended forward gripping parallel handles with straps
exercises.end_pose: handles pulled to torso, elbows behind body, scapulae retracted, lats engaged

exercises.name_es: Pull over en polea con barra recta + straps
exercises.name_en: Cable straight bar pullover with lifting straps
exercises.equipment: high pulley cable with straight bar, lifting straps on wrists
exercises.start_pose: standing facing high pulley, hips hinged back slightly, arms extended overhead gripping bar with straps, elbows nearly straight
exercises.end_pose: arms pulled down to hips with nearly straight elbows, lats contracted, hips back, straps visible

exercises.name_es: Remo unilateral en polea baja con strap
exercises.name_en: Cable one-arm row with wrist strap
exercises.equipment: low pulley cable with single wrist strap (no handle, strap looped around wrist)
exercises.start_pose: staggered stance, one arm extended forward holding strap, torso slightly hinged
exercises.end_pose: elbow pulled back to side of torso, scapula retracted, lat contracted, strap visible on wrist

exercises.equipment: preacher curl machine with arm pad
exercises.start_pose: seated, arms resting on pad, hands on grips, elbows fully extended
exercises.end_pose: elbows flexed, grips brought toward shoulders, biceps contracted

exercises.name_es: Curl bíceps con barra EZ en polea + straps
exercises.name_en: Cable EZ bar curl with lifting straps
exercises.equipment: low pulley with EZ-curl bar attachment, lifting straps
exercises.start_pose: standing, elbows at sides, arms extended down gripping EZ bar with straps
exercises.end_pose: elbows flexed bringing bar to shoulders, biceps contracted

exercises.equipment: recumbent stationary bike
exercises.start_pose: seated on recumbent bike, legs at near-extension pedaling
exercises.end_pose: seated on recumbent bike, opposite leg at near-extension

exercises.equipment: bodyweight
exercises.start_pose: standing, feet shoulder-width apart, arms forward at chest height for balance
exercises.end_pose: squat position, thighs parallel to floor, knees tracking over toes, chest up

exercises.equipment: mini resistance band around thighs or ankles
exercises.start_pose: quarter squat position, feet shoulder-width, band tensioned
exercises.end_pose: quarter squat with one foot stepped wider laterally, band stretched

exercises.equipment: Smith machine with barbell on upper back
exercises.start_pose: standing under bar, bar on upper trapezius, feet slightly forward of bar
exercises.end_pose: deep squat with thighs parallel to floor, bar still on traps, chest up

exercises.equipment: Smith machine with barbell on traps, one leg forward one back
exercises.start_pose: split stance under Smith bar, both knees mostly extended, front foot flat, rear toe down
exercises.end_pose: split squat, both knees 90 degrees, rear knee near floor, front knee over ankle

exercises.equipment: leg extension machine with ankle roller
exercises.start_pose: seated on machine, knees bent 90, ankle roller in front of shins, hands on side grips
exercises.end_pose: knees fully extended (nearly straight), ankle roller raised, quadriceps contracted

exercises.name_en: Machine hip thrust with top pause
exercises.equipment: lever hip thrust machine
exercises.start_pose: seated on hip thrust machine, hips dropped down, lap pad over hips
exercises.end_pose: hips fully extended at top, lap pad raised, body forming straight line, glutes maximally contracted

exercises.equipment: sturdy box or bench plus weighted vest
exercises.start_pose: standing in front of box, wearing weighted vest, one foot flat on box
exercises.end_pose: standing fully extended on box, opposite leg lifted in air, weighted vest visible

exercises.equipment: seated hip adduction machine
exercises.start_pose: seated on machine, legs apart outside pads
exercises.end_pose: legs closed against resistance, pads brought together, adductors contracted

exercises.name_es: Press inclinado en máquina hammer agarre paralelo
exercises.name_en: Lever incline chest press parallel grip
exercises.equipment: hammer strength incline chest press with parallel (neutral) handles
exercises.start_pose: seated on inclined bench, parallel handles at chest level, elbows back
exercises.end_pose: arms extended forward (not locked), parallel handles pushed away from chest

exercises.name_es: Press plano en máquina hammer agarre paralelo
exercises.equipment: hammer strength flat chest press with parallel handles
exercises.start_pose: seated upright, parallel handles at chest level, elbows back at 45 degrees
exercises.end_pose: arms extended forward, parallel handles pushed away from torso

exercises.equipment: hammer strength decline chest press machine
exercises.start_pose: seated reclined, handles at lower chest level, elbows back
exercises.end_pose: arms extended forward and slightly down, handles pushed away

exercises.equipment: pec deck machine with forearm pads
exercises.start_pose: seated, arms wide with forearms against side pads
exercises.end_pose: elbows brought together in front of chest, pectorals contracted

exercises.equipment: seated triceps extension machine
exercises.start_pose: seated with elbows on pad, forearms vertical gripping handles
exercises.end_pose: elbows fully extended, forearms pushed forward/down, triceps contracted

exercises.equipment: hammer strength chest press with parallel handles, narrow grip
exercises.start_pose: seated, elbows close to torso, parallel handles near chest
exercises.end_pose: arms extended forward, handles pushed away, elbows still close to body

exercises.equipment: assault air bike with vertical handles and pedals
exercises.start_pose: seated on air bike, gripping vertical handles, opposite arm/leg forward
exercises.end_pose: seated on air bike, opposite limbs forward, intense pedaling

exercises.equipment: bodyweight
exercises.start_pose: standing upright, feet together, arms at sides
exercises.end_pose: mid-jump with legs wide, arms raised overhead in V

exercises.equipment: light resistance band anchored to side, held in hand of working arm
exercises.start_pose: standing, working elbow tucked at side bent 90, forearm across abdomen, holding band
exercises.end_pose: elbow still tucked, forearm rotated outward against band tension

exercises.equipment: long resistance band held with both hands
exercises.start_pose: standing, arms extended forward at chest height holding band stretched between hands
exercises.end_pose: arms raised in Y shape above head, band stretched, lower traps contracted

exercises.name_es: Press de hombro en máquina agarre paralelo
exercises.name_en: Lever seated hammer grip shoulder press
exercises.equipment: shoulder press machine with parallel (hammer) grip handles
exercises.start_pose: seated upright on machine, parallel handles at shoulder height, elbows below hands
exercises.end_pose: arms extended overhead (not fully locked), parallel handles pushed up

exercises.name_es: Elevación lateral en polea con strap proximal
exercises.name_en: Cable lateral raise with upper-arm wrist strap
exercises.equipment: low pulley with strap looped around upper arm (above elbow), NOT in hand
exercises.start_pose: standing perpendicular to pulley, working arm at side, strap clearly visible wrapped around upper arm above the elbow, hand completely free
exercises.end_pose: arm raised laterally to shoulder height (about 90 degrees), strap still around upper arm, hand free and relaxed

exercises.name_en: Cable face pull with twin lifting straps
exercises.equipment: high pulley with two individual lifting straps (no rope, no handle)
exercises.start_pose: standing facing pulley, arms extended forward at face height each holding one strap
exercises.end_pose: straps pulled toward ears, elbows wide and high in line with shoulders, scapulae retracted

exercises.name_es: Elevación frontal en polea con strap proximal
exercises.name_en: Cable front raise with upper-arm wrist strap
exercises.equipment: low pulley behind, strap looped around upper arm above elbow
exercises.start_pose: standing with pulley behind, working arm at side, strap clearly visible around upper arm above elbow, hand free
exercises.end_pose: arm raised to shoulder height in front, elbow nearly straight, strap still around upper arm

exercises.name_es: Elevación de piernas en silla romana
exercises.equipment: captain's chair / Roman chair with forearm pads
exercises.start_pose: suspended on captain's chair, forearms on pads, legs hanging straight down
exercises.end_pose: legs raised straight forward to horizontal, abdominal contraction visible

exercises.equipment: bodyweight
exercises.start_pose: supine on mat, hands behind head, legs bent in tabletop
exercises.end_pose: right elbow toward left knee, opposite leg extended, torso twisted

exercises.equipment: mat
exercises.start_pose: forearm plank position, elbows under shoulders, body in straight line from heels to head, toes on mat
exercises.end_pose: same position held isometrically — emphasize tight core and straight spine

exercises.equipment: treadmill with 10% incline
exercises.start_pose: standing on inclined treadmill, upright posture, one foot stepping forward
exercises.end_pose: stride mid-motion on inclined treadmill, opposite foot forward, upright posture
